info.title: evra-callops
info.description:
**evra-callops** is the orchestration backend for Evra's outbound call center platform.

It manages campaign lifecycle (start / pause / stop), dispatches contacts to the LiveKit
agent worker, processes call outcomes and telemetry, and exposes a full operational API
for companies, campaigns, contacts, calls, SIP trunks, dashboards, and audit events.

**Authentication:**
- Agent-facing endpoints (`/calls/*`, campaign lifecycle) require `X-Webhook-Secret`
- Frontend endpoints require a Supabase JWT Bearer token

post.description: Transitions a campaign from `draft`, `paused`, or `stopped` to `running`. Enqueues all eligible contacts and starts the call dispatcher. Returns 409 if the campaign is already running or in a terminal state (`completed`, `deleted`, `archived`). Returns 422 if the campaign has no configured SIP trunk.

409.description: Conflict — campaign is in an incompatible state for this action

post.description: Pauses a running campaign. The dispatcher stops pulling new contacts but in-progress calls are allowed to finish. Returns 409 if the campaign is not currently running.

409.description: Conflict — campaign is in an incompatible state for this action

post.description: Permanently stops a running or paused campaign. The contact queue is purged and the dispatcher is halted. This action cannot be undone — use `pause` if you intend to resume later. Returns 409 if the campaign is not active.

409.description: Conflict — campaign is in an incompatible state for this action

post.description: Downloads and caches the campaign script audio on the shared disk cache. Called by the dashboard after a campaign is saved so agents can play audio without per-call HTTP fetches. Requires the `X-Webhook-Secret` header.

200.description: Prefetch completed, skipped, or failed (see response body)

get.description:
Returns real-time statistics for a campaign: current status, contact counts by state, number of active calls in progress, and total calls completed today. Suitable for polling from a dashboard.

`auto_paused` is `true` when the campaign was paused automatically by the scheduling window enforcer (outside allowed calling hours) rather than by a manual pause action. It will be automatically resumed when the next allowed window opens.

post.description: Called by the agent worker at the end of each call to report the outcome. Updates the contact record, applies retry logic, releases the concurrency slot, and triggers any post-call hooks. Requires the `X-Webhook-Secret` header.

409.description: Call record already exists for this room

post.description: Receives a batch of telemetry events and session metadata from the agent worker for a completed call session. Used for observability, debugging, and audit. Requires the `X-Webhook-Secret` header.

get.description: Verifies that the service can reach the configured LiveKit server. Returns `connected: true` and the server URL on success, or `connected: false` with an error message if the connection fails.

200.description: Health check result (may indicate unhealthy via `connected: false`)

get.description: Returns all currently active LiveKit rooms. Rooms with zero participants may still appear until they are explicitly deleted or expire.

schema.title: Response List Rooms Livekit Rooms Get

post.description: Creates a new LiveKit room with the given name. If a room with that name already exists, LiveKit returns the existing room.

201.description: Room created (or returned if already exists)

delete.description: Deletes the specified LiveKit room and disconnects all participants. Safe to call on already-deleted rooms.

get.description: Returns all configured SIP outbound trunks registered in LiveKit.

schema.title: Response List Trunks Livekit Trunks Get

post.description: Registers a new SIP outbound trunk in LiveKit with the provided credentials and phone numbers. The trunk can then be referenced by `trunk_id` when placing calls.

422.description: Request body validation error or no fields provided for update

patch.description: Partially updates an existing SIP outbound trunk. Only fields included in the request body are changed. At least one field must be provided — returns 422 otherwise.

422.description: Request body validation error or no fields provided for update

delete.description: Removes the specified SIP outbound trunk from LiveKit. Any future calls referencing this trunk ID will fail.

post.description: Places a one-off outbound SIP test call to verify trunk and carrier connectivity. The request blocks (up to `timeout_seconds`) until the call is answered or fails. `sip_trunk_id` is required — returns 400 if omitted. Always returns HTTP 200; check the `ok` field to determine success.

200.description: Test call result (check `ok` field for success/failure)

post.description:
Endpoint for the LiveKit server to POST real-time room and participant events. Validates the JWT in the `Authorization` header using the LiveKit API secret — returns 401 on failure.

**Events that update session fields:** `room_started` (sets `room_id`, `started_at`), `room_finished` (sets `ended_at`), `participant_joined` / `participant_left` (tracks SIP leg state).

**Events that log an event row only:** `participant_connection_aborted`, `track_published`, `track_unpublished`, `ingress_started`, `ingress_ended`.

Events for rooms with no matching call session are silently ignored.

get.description: Alias of /security-logs returning the same canonical data.

post.description: Generate TTS audio for preview. Returns a signed URL to the generated file.
Save audio metadata for a campaign after generate/upload.

get.description: List saved script audio metadata. Filter by campaign or company.
Returns `{"status": "ok"}` when the service is up. Used by load balancers and readiness probes.

contact_id.title: Contact Id
contact_id.description: ID of the contact record in the database.

campaign_id.title: Campaign Id
campaign_id.description: ID of the campaign this call belongs to.

room_name.title: Room Name
room_name.description: LiveKit room name that was used for this call.

outcome.title: Outcome
outcome.description: Call outcome reported by the agent. Typical values: `answered`, `no_answer`, `busy`, `failed`, `transferred`, `voicemail`.

phone.title: Phone
phone.description: Phone number dialed in E.164 format.

talk_seconds.title: Talk Seconds
talk_seconds.description: Total duration of the connected call in seconds.

transferred.title: Transferred
transferred.description: True if the call was transferred to a live agent before ending.

retry_count.title: Retry Count
retry_count.description: Number of times this contact has been retried before this attempt.

attempt.title: Attempt
attempt.description: 1-based attempt number for this contact within the campaign.

dtmf_digits.title: Dtmf Digits
dtmf_digits.description: DTMF digits pressed during the call.

agent_outcome.title: Agent Outcome
agent_outcome.description: Agent-level outcome (e.g. interested, not_interested, opt_out, callback_requested).

business_disposition.title: Business Disposition
business_disposition.description: Business-layer label set by the agent script.

room_name.title: Room Name
room_name.description: LiveKit room name associated with this telemetry batch.

session_report.title: Session Report
session_report.description: Serialised `SessionReport` from the LiveKit Agents SDK, emitted at session end. Key fields: `job_id` (agent job ID), `room_id` (room SID), `room` (room name), `duration` (session seconds), `started_at` (unix ts), `timestamp` (report creation unix ts), `sdk_version` (agents SDK version string), `model_usage` (list of per-model token summaries — each has `label`, `prompt_tokens`, `completion_tokens`, `total_tokens`).

sip_attributes.title: Sip Attributes
sip_attributes.description: SIP-layer metadata captured during the call, separate from the agent `SessionReport`. Typically includes `sip_call_id`, codec, carrier response codes, and any SIP headers forwarded by the LiveKit SIP bridge.

disconnect_reason.title: Disconnect Reason
disconnect_reason.description: Reason the LiveKit room or SIP leg was disconnected. Mirrors LiveKit's `DisconnectReason` enum values, e.g. `client_initiated`, `room_deleted`, `participant_removed`, `signal_close`, `state_mismatch`.

job_id.title: Job Id
job_id.description: LiveKit agent job ID for this session. Matches `session_report.job_id` when both are present.

room_id.title: Room Id
room_id.description: LiveKit room SID (server-assigned). Matches `session_report.room_id` when both are present.

sip_participant_sid.title: Sip Participant Sid
sip_participant_sid.description: SIP participant SID for this session.

dtmf_digits.title: Dtmf Digits
dtmf_digits.description: DTMF digits pressed during the call.

events.title: Events
events.description: Ordered list of SDK metric events emitted during the call session.

auto_paused.title: Auto Paused
auto_paused.description: True when the campaign was automatically paused by the scheduling window enforcer rather than a manual action.

active_calls.title: Active Calls
active_calls.description: Number of calls currently in progress for this campaign.

queued.title: Queued
queued.description: Total contacts waiting to be dialed (pending + retry).

pending.title: Pending
pending.description: Contacts that have not yet been attempted.

in_progress.title: In Progress
in_progress.description: Contacts whose call is currently being handled by the agent.

dialed.title: Dialed
dialed.description: Contacts that have been reached (answered calls).

failed.title: Failed
failed.description: Contacts whose call attempts all failed (no answer, busy, error) with no remaining retries.

retry.title: Retry
retry.description: Contacts scheduled for a retry attempt.

completed_today.title: Completed Today
completed_today.description: Total calls completed (any terminal outcome) since midnight UTC today.

status.title: Status
status.description: Current lifecycle status of the campaign. One of: `draft`, `running`, `paused`, `stopped`, `completed`, `archived`.

numbers.title: Numbers
numbers.description: List of phone numbers assigned to this trunk in E.164 format.

name.title: Name
name.description: Unique name for the new LiveKit room.

phone.title: Phone
phone.description: Destination phone number in E.164 format.

sip_trunk_id.title: Sip Trunk Id
sip_trunk_id.description: LiveKit SIP trunk ID to use for the call. Required — returns 400 if omitted.

room_name.title: Room Name
room_name.description: LiveKit room name to create for this test call. Auto-generated from timestamp if omitted.

participant_identity.title: Participant Identity
participant_identity.description: Identity string for the SIP participant in LiveKit.

participant_name.title: Participant Name
participant_name.description: Display name for the SIP participant.

from_number.title: From Number
from_number.description: Caller ID (from number) in E.164 format. Uses trunk default if omitted.

wait_until_answered.title: Wait Until Answered
wait_until_answered.description: If true, the request blocks until the call is answered or times out.

krisp_enabled.title: Krisp Enabled
krisp_enabled.description: Enable Krisp noise cancellation on the LiveKit track.

timeout_seconds.title: Timeout Seconds
timeout_seconds.description: Maximum seconds to wait for the call to be answered before returning a timeout error.

deleted.title: Deleted
deleted.description: True if the room was successfully deleted.

room_name.title: Room Name
room_name.description: Name of the room that was deleted.

deleted.title: Deleted
deleted.description: True if the trunk was successfully deleted.

trunk_id.title: Trunk Id
trunk_id.description: ID of the trunk that was deleted.

connected.title: Connected
connected.description: True if the service can reach the LiveKit server.

url.title: Url
url.description: LiveKit server WebSocket URL being checked.

error.title: Error
error.description: Error message if the connection check failed. `null` when connected.

numbers.title: Numbers
numbers.description: Phone numbers assigned to this trunk in E.164 format.

auth_username.title: Auth Username
auth_username.description: SIP authentication username used when placing calls through this trunk. Password is never returned.

num_participants.title: Num Participants
num_participants.description: Current number of participants connected to the room.

event_type.title: Event Type
event_type.description: Metric type emitted by the LiveKit Agents SDK. One of: `llm_metrics`, `stt_metrics`, `tts_metrics`, `vad_metrics`, `eou_metrics`, `eot_inference_metrics`, `realtime_model_metrics`, `interruption_metrics`.

payload.title: Payload
payload.description:
Metric payload whose shape depends on `event_type`. Common fields by type:

**llm_metrics**: `label` (model id), `ttft` (time-to-first-token s), `duration` (s), `completion_tokens`, `prompt_tokens`, `prompt_cached_tokens`, `total_tokens`, `tokens_per_second`, `cancelled`

**stt_metrics**: `label`, `duration`, `audio_duration` (audio seconds pushed), `input_tokens`, `output_tokens`, `streamed`, `acquire_time`, `connection_reused`

**tts_metrics**: `label`, `ttfb` (time-to-first-byte s), `audio_duration` (synthesized s), `characters_count`, `input_tokens`, `output_tokens`, `cancelled`

**vad_metrics**: `idle_time` (s), `inference_duration_total` (s), `inference_count`

**eou_metrics**: `end_of_utterance_delay` (s), `transcription_delay` (s), `on_user_turn_completed_delay` (s)

**eot_inference_metrics**: `total_duration` (s), `detection_delay` (s), `prediction_duration` (s), `num_requests`

**interruption_metrics**: `num_interruptions`, `num_backchannels`, `total_duration` (s), `detection_delay` (s)

**realtime_model_metrics**: `ttft`, `session_duration`, `input_tokens`, `output_tokens`, `total_tokens`, `input_token_details` (audio/text/cached breakdown), `output_token_details` (text/audio)

occurred_at.title: Occurred At
occurred_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the event occurred, if available.

ok.title: Ok
ok.description: True if the call was successfully placed and answered.

room_name.title: Room Name
room_name.description: LiveKit room name used for the test call.

sip_trunk_id.title: Sip Trunk Id
sip_trunk_id.description: SIP trunk ID used for the call.

phone.title: Phone
phone.description: Destination phone number that was dialed.

participant_identity.title: Participant Identity
participant_identity.description: Identity of the SIP participant as registered in LiveKit.

sip_status_code.title: Sip Status Code
sip_status_code.description: SIP response code from the carrier. Only present on failure (e.g. 486 Busy Here, 480 Temporarily Unavailable).

sip_status.title: Sip Status
sip_status.description: Human-readable SIP status corresponding to `sip_status_code`. Only present on failure.

message.title: Message
message.description: Error or informational message. Present when `ok` is false.

name.title: Name
name.description: New human-readable name for the trunk. Omit to leave unchanged.

address.title: Address
address.description: New SIP server address. Omit to leave unchanged.

numbers.title: Numbers
numbers.description: Replacement list of E.164 phone numbers. Omit to leave unchanged.

auth_username.title: Auth Username
auth_username.description: New SIP auth username. Omit to leave unchanged.

auth_password.title: Auth Password
auth_password.description: New SIP auth password. Omit to leave unchanged.

tags.name: campaigns
tags.description: Start, pause, stop, and inspect live stats for outbound calling campaigns.

tags.name: calls
tags.description: Receive call outcome reports and telemetry events from the agent worker.

tags.name: livekit
tags.description: Manage LiveKit rooms, SIP outbound trunks, run test calls, and receive LiveKit webhooks.

tags.name: me
tags.description: Current user profile and company memberships.

tags.name: lookups
tags.description: Enum value lists for UI dropdowns (statuses, outcomes, timezones).

tags.name: campaigns-management
tags.description: Campaign CRUD, archive, restore, and duplicate.

tags.name: contacts
tags.description: Contact CRUD, import, bulk operations, do-not-call.

tags.name: calls-history
tags.description: Call history with filters, detail, events, telemetry, and recording URL.

tags.name: sip-trunks
tags.description: SIP trunk CRUD, vault credentials, test-call, and health.

tags.name: dashboard
tags.description: Analytics summary, live queue, outcomes, call-volume, campaign performance.

tags.name: intent-stats
tags.description: Intent funnel metrics per campaign and company.

tags.name: dashboard-templates
tags.description: Saved dashboard layout templates with default scoping.

tags.name: audit
tags.description: Security logs and audit event history.

tags.name: script-audio
tags.description: TTS audio generation, save, and metadata listing.
